notes: olapdb-tso (the Timestamp Oracle) fails first: FoundationDB transaction timeouts during TSO leader-election and CAS operations (commit 3d8221b4 lowered the TSO CAS retry budget). Without commit timestamps, metric-ingestor-1 cannot acquire CnchLocks / commit write txns, so the Flink job 'stream-taskmanager' (taskmanager) reading from that ingestion path goes unhealthy, and platform-api finally returns errors. The LOUDEST, paging signal is FlinkJobUnhealthy (PagerDuty) on stream-taskmanager, which is the LAST victim before platform-api. A model that blames stream-taskmanager (the Flink alert) falls for the trap. kafka-metric-ingestor flapped on a deploy at onset (decoy); flags are decoys.
